title: [BUG] Security vulnerability on minimist 1.2.5 which is dependent on exceljs/4.3.0
author: mokks
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: minimist 1.2.5

## Steps To Reproduce

minimist 1.2.5 is transitive dependent on excel js 4.3.0. 
excel js 4.3.0 is on the latest version and hence we are unable to resolve the security vulnerability on minimist 1.2.5 even though minimist 1.2.6 is available with no vulnerabilities in the blackduck.

## The expected behaviour:

minimist which is dependent on excel js should not have any security vulnerabilities.


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript

```

comments.author: kbrooks
comments.body:
It looks like this project isn't getting updates. You can fix this vulnerability by adding this line to the `resolutions` object in packages.json:
```
    "exceljs/unzipper/fstream/mkdirp/minimist": "^1.2.6"
```
This will force exceljs to use the updated minimist version.
